---
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
  feed: true
  categories: false
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {.section-head}
<p class="section-crumb">~/writing/</p>

# Field notes

<p class="section-subtitle">Long-form posts working through the production AI stack — embeddings, retrieval, evals, agents, fine-tuning — one component at a time, with running code and measured numbers. Each post is paired with a companion notebook in [ml-applied-depth](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/ml-applied-depth).</p>
:::
